title: Better Brewing
description: Adds more potions and QoL features surrounding the brewing system
body:
Better Brewing is a mod that extends the vanilla potion catalogue and brings some needed quality of life changes like potion stacking.

# Features
## New Potions
### Potion of Levitation
Suspend yourself in the air and float away! Brewed from **Potion of Slow Falling** with **Shulker Shell**

### Potion of Efficiency
No longer do you need a beacon to get work done quicker. Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Amethyst Shard**

### Potion of Inefficiency
...or you can get the work done slower. Brewed from **Potion of Efficiency** with **Fermented Spider Eye**

### Potion of Blindness
Wait, this isn't night vision! Brewed from **Potion of Night Vision** with **Fermented Spider Eye**

### Potion of Darkness
_"It's right behind me, isn't it?"_ Brewed from **Potion of Night Vision** with **Sculk**

### Potion of Resistance
A tonic with a hardening effect. Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Raw Iron Ore**

### Potion of Absorption
Gives you temporary extra hearts. Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Golden Apple**

### Potion of Lifeforce
Increases your max health. Brewed from **Potion of Absorption** with **Golden Carrot**

### Potion of Glowing
Makes any entity glow an outline that shines through walls. Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Glow Berries**

### Potion of Nutrition
_"Isn't this just apple juice?"_ Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Apple**

### Potion of Starvation
A drink that makes you more exhausted. Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Rotten Flesh**

### Potion of Decay
Inflicts you with wither sickness. Brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Wither Rose**

### Potion of Sickness
Juisss that makesh you feeeel dishyy... Brewed from **Potion of Saturation** with **Fermented Spider Eye**

## New Effects
These effects were ported from the April Fools snapshots. 
### Sticky
Climb and scale up walls like a spider. Used in **Potion of Sticky**, brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Slime Ball**

### Big
Scales any entity up, increasing their reach and step height. Used in **Potion of Inflation**, brewed from **Awkward Potion** with **Wind Charge**

### Small
Shrinks entities, decreasing their reach and step height. Used in **Potion of Shrinking**, brewed from **Potion of Inflation** and **Ghast Tear**

## Features
Potions, splash potions, and lingering potions now stack up to 16.
